content.heading: AI Presentation Builder
content.subheading: Create presentation decks from a single topic

slides.speaker_notes: Welcome everyone. This demo shows how AI can generate a structured deck and export it to PowerPoint.

bullets.detail: Users spend hours planning structure and content
Slides often lack layout and visual coherence
AI text must be manually copied into PowerPoint

slides.speaker_notes: Many people can explain their idea, but turning it into a deck takes too long. Our tool reduces that friction.

content.heading: Our Solution
content.left_column:
Input:
• Topic
• Audience
• Tone
• Number of slides
content.right_column:
Output:
• Structured JSON
• Previewable slides
• Speaker notes
• PPTX export

slides.speaker_notes: The system transforms a simple input into a structured deck. The JSON format makes generation, preview, and export reliable.

content.quote: Great presentations start with clear structure.
content.author: AI Presentation Builder

slides.speaker_notes: The core idea is not just generating text. It is generating presentation-ready structure.

content.heading: Ready to Build Better Decks
content.subheading: From topic to PPTX in one workflow

slides.speaker_notes: This closes the demo. The next step is improving themes, templates, and collaboration.
